texto: You can love someone, hell, you can love a lot of someones, but when you find the right person--the one that you're meant to be with--it's like..." "You can breathe for the first time," she finishes for me. "Yes." I cant help but smile.I needed to find that to understand." And you have," She says softly."Lucy." "Lucy," I agree.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cheryl McIntyre: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “You can love someone, hell, you can love a lot of someones, but when you find the right person--t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, baby, bad-boy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bad-boy e soulmates.

frase_original: You can love someone, hell, you can love a lot of someones, but when you find the right person--the one that you're meant to be with--it's like..." "You can breathe for the first time," she finishes for me. "Yes." I cant help but smile.I needed to find that to understand." And you have," She says softly."Lucy." "Lucy," I agree.
